name: Broccoli Loaf Supreme
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen chopped broccoli (10 oz), thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Saute onion in butter until tender; set aside.
3. Combine eggs, milk, mustard, salt, pepper, and garlic powder in a large bowl.
4. Stir in broccoli, bread crumbs, cheese, and onion.
5. Spoon the mixture into a 9 x 5 inch loaf tin.
6. Place the loaf pan in a shallow baking pan on the oven rack.
7. Pour 2 inches of hot water into a large shallow baking pan.
8. Bake for about 1 hour or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
9. Remove the loaf pan from the hot water pan and let stand for a few minutes.
10. Unmold on a serving platter.
11. Make sauce: Melt butter in a saucepan; stir in flour and salt until smooth.
12. Remove from heat; gradually stir in milk and Worcestershire sauce, bringing to a boil.
13. Stir and boil 1 minute; remove from heat and add cheese, stirring until melted.
14. Garnish the loaf with sliced hard boiled egg and spoon sauce over the loaf.
